repo.description: Efficient distortion loss with O(n) realization.

terms.context_snippet: Distortion loss is proposed by [mip-nerf-360](https://jonbarron.info/mipnerf360/), which encourages volume rendering weights to be compact and sparse and can alleviate *floater* and *background collapse* artifact.
